title: stenorrhynchos cinnabarinum var. paludicola
intro: Stenorrhynchos cinnabarinum var. paludicola, also known as the swamp dragon or swamp stenorrhynchos, is a type of orchid plant that belongs to the subfamily Orchidoideae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a tea or tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
